main.description: A single B.A.T.S. game round play (matching a white card to a black card).

promptAtUri.description: The unique ID (AT-URI) of the Black Card being answered.

responseAtUri.description: The unique ID (AT-URI) of the White Card the player chose.

playerDid.description: The DID of the player making this move.

winner.description: True if the Card Czar picked this as the winning blob.
